_comment_purpose: PROJECT-SCOPE MCP registry for sessions with CWD=~/.claude/. Servers here load only for system-maintenance work in this dir; per-project servers belong in each project's own .mcp.json. Parsing rule: `_comment_*` keys MUST be at the top level (siblings of `mcpServers`), NEVER inside `mcpServers`. For GLOBAL availability across all CWDs, register via `claude mcp add -s user`.
_comment_wave2_2026_04_27: Wave 2 prune: cut 9 project-scope servers (supabase, stripe, resend, sentry, upstash, netlify, firecrawl, 21st-dev, maestro). Each is documented in INSTALLED.md with one-command re-add for per-project use. Statsig retained at user request pending future auth.

statsig._activate: Get `console-` key from console.statsig.com/api_keys, then: claude mcp add -s user --transport http --header 'statsig-api-key: console-KEY' statsig https://api.statsig.com/v1/mcp
